finding: Dehlavi citation pattern consistent across entire Chapter 7
scope: All 3,826 lines of Tuhfat Chapter 7 (باب هفتم در امامت)
methodology: Regex scan for book citation patterns (در کتاب, صحیح, مسند, سنن, المستدرك) across entire chapter
conclusion: Dehlavi quotes 58 hadiths in Chapter 7 without naming a single source book, chain, or page reference. This is consistent across all 12 hadith sections plus the Quranic and rational argument sections. The bare-citation pattern seen in Thaqalayn/Safinah is his standard approach throughout the book.
scholar_confirmation: The user's scholar confirms this is Dehlavi's consistent style — it does not change in other sections.
